author: driver--build-ferrum-phase-0-coordinator
content: Delivered: ferrum-polynomial fully implemented — 6 basis classes (Polynomial, Chebyshev, Legendre, Laguerre, Hermite, HermiteE), Poly trait with eval/deriv/integ/roots/fit/divmod, Clenshaw evaluation, self-contained QR eigenvalue solver for root-finding (avoids ferrum-linalg dependency), Vandermonde fitting with Cholesky/LU. 73 tests passing, clippy clean.
